zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Brydges於1475年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾可利時，他的父親Thomas Brugge49歲，母親Florence Darell50歲。他和Lady Margery Hungerford至少有1個女兒。他去世於1559年2月18日在英國波克夏紐波利享年84歲，埋葬在英國波克夏紐波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Brydges于1475年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾可利时，他的父亲Thomas Brugge49岁，母亲Florence Darell50岁。他和Lady Margery Hungerford至少有1个女儿。他去世于1559年2月18日在英国波克夏紐波利享年84岁，埋葬在英国波克夏紐波利。

nameMeanings.name: Brydges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bridges
meanings: English: variant of Bridge . The -s generally represents the genitive case, but may occasionally be a plural. In some cases this name denoted someone from the Flemish city of Bruges (Brugge) in Belgium, meaning ‘bridges’, which had extensive trading links with England in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Brydges was born in 1475, in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Thomas Brugge, was 49 and his mother, Florence Darell, was 50. He had at least 1 daughter with Lady Margery Hungerford. He died on 18 February 1559, in Newbury, Berkshire, England, at the age of 84, and was buried in Newbury, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Brydges est né en 1475, à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Brugge, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Florence Darell, avait 50 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Lady Margery Hungerford. Il est décédé le 18 février 1559, à Newbury, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans, et a été enterré à Newbury, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Brydges 1475 in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Brugge 49 und seine Mutter Florence Darell 50. Er hatte mit Lady Margery Hungerford mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 18. Februar 1559 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Newbury, Berkshire, England und wurde in Newbury, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Brydges è nato il nel 1475 nel Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Brugge, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Florence Darell, aveva 50 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Lady Margery Hungerford. Morì il 18 febbraio 1559, nel Newbury, Berkshire, England, all'età di 84 anni, e fu sepolto a Newbury, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Brydgesが1475年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Bruggeは49歳，母Florence Darellは50歳であった。彼はLady Margery Hungerfordとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1559年2月18日にイギリスバークシュアイアニューブリーで84歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアニューブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Brydges(이)가 1475년 영국 그루스스터실르 컵를리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Brugge(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Florence Darell(은)는 50세였다. 그는 Lady Margery Hungerford(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1559년 2월 18일 영국 버크실르 뉴버이에서 84세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 뉴버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Brydges nasceu em 1475, em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Brugge, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Florence Darell, tinha 50 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Lady Margery Hungerford. Ele faleceu em 18 de fevereiro de 1559, em Newbury, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos, e foi sepultado em Newbury, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Brydges родился в 1475 г. в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Brugge было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Florence Darell, 50. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Lady Margery Hungerford. Он умер 18 февраля 1559 г. в местности нюбури, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет и был похоронен в местности нюбури, биркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Brydges nació en 1475, en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Brugge, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Florence Darell, tenía 50 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Lady Margery Hungerford. Murió el 18 de febrero de 1559, en Newbury, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años, y fue sepultado en Newbury, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
